response.justification: Bogdan is a deeply experienced generalist (15+ years across web, embedded, high-throughput backend systems) with genuinely relevant current work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq, plus a CS degree from MIT. However, the role demands 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year; the resume shows no vector database, RAG, evaluation-pipeline, or LLM-optimization work, and Python is absent from his skill set. He could grow into the role, but he does not meet the core staff-level GenAI bar as written.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP servers and agentic-workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
Broad, senior full-stack engineering depth: TypeScript/Node, AWS CDK, low-latency distributed systems at scale
Strong mentorship and communication track record (workshops, courses, conference talks, open-source leadership)
concerns: AI/GenAI experience is roughly one year, far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
No demonstrated vector database, RAG architecture, or AI evaluation/observability pipeline experience
No Python on the resume and limited evidence of designing AI systems on major cloud platforms

key_factors.factor: Falls far short of 8+ years AI-solutions requirement
Active MCP and agentic-tooling work aligns with key technologies
Missing RAG, vector DB, and evaluation-pipeline evidence
